name.tr: UK to Turkey New Furniture Shipping
name.en: UK to Turkey New Furniture Shipping

description.tr: New furniture from retail or workshop origins in England and the United Kingdom to Turkey with packing, palletisation and optional assembly by Hanbros UK.
description.en: New furniture from retail or workshop origins in England and the United Kingdom to Turkey with packing, palletisation and optional assembly by Hanbros UK.

keyword.tr: retail furniture flatpack shipping, showroom palletisation, optional assembly delivery
keyword.en: retail furniture flatpack shipping, showroom palletisation, optional assembly delivery

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Part counts and carton strength affect stowage plans. Door and lift access are verified before delivery.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Part counts and carton strength affect stowage plans. Door and lift access are verified before delivery.
